description: Mixed DAE: a scalar state x with dx/dt = -k*x, plus an observed y = x^2. After discretize(), the equation set contains 1 differential and 1 algebraic equation. RFC §12 binding contract: dae_support=true -> accept (metadata.system_class = "dae"); dae_support=false -> abort with code E_NO_DAE_SUPPORT.

expect.note: The path format for the algebraic-equation reference is binding-idiomatic (Julia is 1-based, JSON-pointer-style bindings are 0-based). The conformance harness only requires that the model name (`models.M`) and the substring `equations` appear in the message so that a reader can locate the offender.
